  • Method Details

    • loadSpringCloudKubernetesImage

      public static void loadSpringCloudKubernetesImage(String imageNameWithoutTag, org.testcontainers.k3s.K3sContainer container)

    • loadOrPullCommonTestImages

      public static void loadOrPullCommonTestImages(org.testcontainers.k3s.K3sContainer container, String tarName, String imageNameForDownload, String imageVersion)
      Ensures a common external test image is available inside K3s/containerd. It first checks whether the image is already present in K3s. If not, it tries to load it as a tar under '/tmp/docker/images'. If no matching tar is found, it pulls the image directly inside K3s using 'ctr images pull'. This is meant for shared test images such as busybox, wiremock, kafka, etc.

    • validateImage

      public static void validateImage(String image, org.testcontainers.k3s.K3sContainer container)
      validates that the provided image does exist in the local docker registry. This is only needed when running tests locally, in github actions images are already built by the pipeline.

    • pullImage

      public static void pullImage(String imageWithTag, String tarName, org.testcontainers.k3s.K3sContainer container) throws InterruptedException
      Throws:
      InterruptedException
